arrow.summary: an arrowhead on a {@link Line}: four world-space fins (Bevy's fletched shape) at the line's endpoints.

start.description: a head at the start endpoint when nonzero

end.description: a head at the end endpoint when nonzero

size.description: head size relative to the shaft length

backdrop.summary: select a Sear camera's backdrop — the {@link Backgrounds} recipe drawn behind the scene as a fullscreen

name.description: the registered background drawn behind the scene (selected by name)

body.summary: a rigid body simulated by the solver: falls under gravity and collides with other bodies (`mass: 0` = static).

shape.description: the collider, a `ShapeKind`: `Box` (an OBB of `halfExtents`), `Sphere`, `Capsule` (a segment along local Y inflated by the radius), or `Hull` (a convex polytope registered in `Hulls`).

pos.description: spawn position; the solver owns it after spawn.

quat.description: spawn orientation, authored as euler degrees like `Transform.rot`; physics-owned after spawn.

half-extents.description: box/AABB half-extents in `xyz`; `w` doubles as the rounding radius (sphere/capsule) or the `Hull` id (a hull has radius 0, so the lane is free).

mass.description: mass in kg; `0` or less marks a static body that never moves.

friction.description: coulomb friction coefficient: `0` slides freely, higher grips.

camera.summary: camera component. Pose comes from {@link Transform} (looks down its local -Z). A lone camera

antialias.description: antialiasing: 1 = 4× MSAA (default), 0 = off (single-sample, crisp — for a pixel-art look)

character.summary: a kinematic character — a capsule {@link Body} (`mass <= 0`) swept against the scene's bodies each fixed

max-slope.description: steepest walkable slope in degrees — a contact flatter than this grounds the character; steeper, it slides

jump-speed.description: the launch velocity a buffered + grounded {@link jump} sets — 0 disables jumping

gravity.description: per-character gravity (negative, snappier than the world for a player) — 0 = the configured world gravity

color.summary: per-entity base color. Authored CPU-side as a linear {@link Quad}, but mirrored to the GPU as one

depth.summary: opt a Sear camera into the **depth lane** — the prepass *stores* its single-sample depth and publishes

fog.summary: the scene's volumetric atmosphere — one per scene (a singleton). The fog pass marches each pixel from the

density.description: base extinction coefficient — how fast the scene fades into haze with distance (0 = clear)

color.description: hex sRGB haze color the scene fades toward (e.g. 0xb5c4d8)

absorption.description: absorbed fraction of extinction [0,1]; the rest scatters (the scattering albedo for light shafts)

scattering.description: in-scatter strength — how brightly light shafts glow in the haze

anisotropy.description: Henyey-Greenstein anisotropy [-1,1]: 0 even glow, →1 forward (bright halo toward a light)

height-base.description: world height where density equals `density` — the base of the height falloff

height-falloff.description: exponential density falloff per world unit above `heightBase` (0 = uniform haze, no height fog)

steps.description: raymarch step count along each pixel's ray (clamped to 256); more = smoother, costlier

jitter.description: per-pixel step jitter [0,1] that breaks march banding into noise (0 = fixed midpoint sampling)

glaze.summary: per-camera postfx tuning. A camera tonemaps Neutral by default (no `Glaze` needed); add `Glaze` to

joint.summary: a hard joint pinning two bodies together: a rigid linear pin plus an optional angular lock, referencing both by `@name`.

r-a.description: the pin's anchor on body `a`, in its local frame.

r-b.description: the pin's anchor on body `b`, in its local frame.

stiffness-ang.description: angular lock: `0` (default) leaves rotation free (spherical); `∞` locks orientation — author `stiffness-ang: fixed`.

line.summary: a debug line anchored to an entity, drawn from its {@link Transform} position along a world-rotated

offset.description: line vector from the entity in its local frame, rotated by the transform (`0 1 0` = one unit up)

visible.description: drawn when nonzero; set to 0 to hide without removing (edit-mode safe)

listener.summary: marks the spatial listener entity — its `Transform` orients the FOA + HRTF render

material.summary: per-entity PBR material the `default` / `vertex` surfaces read (alongside `Color`, the base albedo).

params.description: the four PBR lanes `(metallic, roughness, emissive, occlusion)`, authored named via the `material` attribute (`material="metallic: 1; roughness: 0.2"`).

orbit.summary: orbit camera controls: drag to rotate around a target, scroll to zoom

yaw.description: horizontal orbit angle around the target, radians

pitch.description: vertical orbit angle, radians; clamped to min/maxPitch

distance.description: camera distance from the target, world units (perspective zoom)

smoothness.description: follow damping, 0–1; higher snaps to the target pose faster

fly-smoothness.description: fly look damping, 0–1; higher is snappier; default tighter than orbit so first-person look tracks closely

sensitivity.description: orbit look speed (yaw/pitch), radians per pixel of mouse drag

fly-sensitivity.description: fly look speed (yaw/pitch), radians per pixel; separate so fly look reads calmer than orbit

zoom-speed.description: zoom factor applied per scroll-wheel notch

orbit-button.description: mouse button that orbits: 0 left, 1 middle, 2 right

pan-button.description: mouse button that pans: 0 left, 1 middle, 2 right

fly-button.description: mouse button that flies (hold to look around, WASD/QE to move): 0 left, 1 middle, 2 right

pan.description: pan offset from the orbit target, world units

fly-speed.description: WASD/QE fly speed, world units per second; scroll while flying adjusts it (clamped to flyMin/flyMax)

fly-boost.description: shift-held fly boost multiplier, transient; scales flySpeed while shift is down, never stored

fly-min.description: lower clamp for scroll-adjusted flySpeed, world units per second

fly-max.description: upper clamp for scroll-adjusted flySpeed, world units per second

mode.description: Free orbits, pans, and zooms; Locked disables orbit rotation, leaving pan and zoom

target.description: entity to orbit; pan is relative to its position (0 = world origin)

outline.summary: outline highlight: a colored band hugs the object's silhouette for hover, selection, or grab feedback.

color.description: band color, linear rgb (alpha unused in v1)

width.description: band thickness in pixels, clamped to 64

occlude.description: 0 = always-on-top (default); 1 = occlusion-aware, hidden where the object is behind other geometry (needs sear's `Depth` on the camera)

part.summary: ECS-shaped opt-in for Part rendering. `surface` holds the {@link Surfaces}

player.summary: first-person player — the look + camera layer over a kinematic {@link Character}. Lives on the same capsule

yaw.description: look yaw in radians (turn around world Y); set it to face a direction at spawn

pitch.description: look pitch in radians (clamped to ±90°); set it to tilt the view at spawn

speed.description: walk speed (m/s) the move input is scaled to

sprint.description: sprint multiplier applied while Shift is held

sensitivity.description: mouse-look radians per pixel of pointer-lock movement, at a fixed 1080px reference height (the look

eye-height.description: camera height above the capsule centre (the eye offset)

distance.description: camera pull-back from the eye: 0 = first-person, > 0 = third-person (scaffolding)

camera.description: the linked camera entity (a Camera + Transform); set this or the camera never moves

point-light.summary: point light component. Position comes from the entity's `Transform`; sear's

range.description: the distance (metres) the falloff smoothly reaches zero at — the cull cutoff

radius.description: the physical source radius (metres): a soft sphere, not a point. Larger softens the near-field

resolution.summary: render this camera at a fixed low resolution and scale it up to fill the canvas, crisp not blurred.

width.description: render width in pixels; 0 = derive from height to keep the canvas aspect

height.description: render height in pixels; 0 = derive from width to keep the canvas aspect

sear.summary: marker selecting Sear as the active renderer on a Camera entity. A camera carrying it renders through

sequence.summary: a timeline that plays {@link Tween}s placed on it with `at` — a shared playhead many tweens read

state.description: play control; a fresh sequence defaults to playing

elapsed.description: playhead position, seconds; the tweens on it read their slice as `elapsed - at`

duration.description: timeline period, seconds; grows to span its tweens' ends

loop.description: wrap the whole timeline back to the start on completion

shadow.summary: shadow tuning, on a light entity — presence is the switch (like {@link Tag} on a camera), the

distance.description: the sun's max shadow distance — the camera view range is split into cascades out to it; raise to shadow farther, lower for finer near texels. Ignored on a point light (coverage is its `range`).

depth-bias.description: a small residual depth bias toward the light, covering flat faces dead-on to it the normal offset can't.

normal-bias.description: the primary acne fix: shifts the receiver along its surface normal by this many shadow texels before the depth compare. Raise if acne shows, lower if shadows detach at contact edges.

skin.summary: a skinned glTF instance's animation state — one `slab(vec4)` published as `"skin"`: lane x is the play

sky.summary: the scene's procedural sky — one per scene (a singleton). A camera shows it by selecting the registered

zenith.description: hex sRGB color overhead, at the zenith (e.g. 0x89b6e9)

horizon.description: hex sRGB color at the horizon, blended up toward `zenith`

band.description: bright band strength right at the horizon line [0,1] (0 = none)

sun-color.description: hex sRGB tint of the sun glow + disk (the sun's *position* follows the directional light)

sun-size.description: sun disk size [0,1] — larger paints a bigger disk

sun-glow.description: sun glow strength around the disk [0,1] (0 = no glow)

cloud-coverage.description: cloud coverage [0,1] — how much of the sky the clouds fill (0 = clear)

cloud-height.description: cloud layer height — scales the projected cloud size (larger = higher, smaller clouds)

star-amount.description: star density [0,1] — more stars in the grid

haze-color.description: hex sRGB haze color the horizon fades toward

sound.summary: a playing sound, mirroring Bevy's `AudioPlayer` + `PlaybackSettings`: add it

instrument.description: registered instrument or sample name, resolved to an id (a bare sample auto-wraps a sampler)

loop.description: 0 = one-shot (frees itself when the envelope idles), 1 = loop until the `Sound` is removed

volume.description: playback level 0–1, quadratic; firehoses live to the voice

pitch.description: pitch offset in semitones (oscillator instruments only); firehoses live to the voice

voice.description: allocated voice handle, managed by the audio system — read-only, don't author

spot.summary: spot add-on for a {@link PointLight} — presence narrows the light into a cone (like {@link Shadow},

inner.description: the cone's inner half-angle (degrees, axis→edge) — full brightness inside it

outer.description: the cone's outer half-angle (degrees, axis→edge) — dark past it, smooth between inner and outer

spring.summary: a soft distance spring linking two bodies, pulling them toward a rest length; its own entity, referencing the bodies by `@name`.

r-a.description: anchor point on body `a`, in its local frame.

r-b.description: anchor point on body `b`, in its local frame.

rest.description: the target distance the spring pulls the anchors toward.

sprite.summary: a textured world-space quad (icon, marker) anchored to an entity's {@link Transform}. `image` is

image.description: registered image id (see {@link image}); a scene's `image:` resolves the registered name

size.description: quad size in world units, before the transform's scale

anchor.description: 0..1 pivot within the quad; 0.5 0.5 centers, 0.5 0 pins the bottom edge to the entity

color.description: hex sRGB tint multiplied into the texture

opacity.description: texture-alpha multiplier; under clip blend it shrinks the cutout, under alpha blend it fades

fill.description: leading fraction of the image shown, 0..1, along {@link fillMode}

tag.summary: opt a Sear camera into the **id lane** — the `view.tag` target {@link PrepassSystem} fills. Unreal's

text.summary: a world-space text label anchored to an entity's {@link Transform}. Register the string with

content.description: interned string id (see {@link text}); a scene's `content:` interns the raw string

font.description: registered font id (see {@link font}); 0 is the default face

anchor.description: 0..1 pivot within the label; 0 0 = bottom-left, 0.5 0.5 centered

textured.summary: per-instance material id — an index into the per-material palette (`materialData`) the textured glTF

transform.summary: per-entity transform: pos, rot, scale as direct {@link Quad} fields. Lanes

tween.summary: animate one numeric field of a target over time, with an easing curve

state.description: play control; a fresh tween defaults to playing

field.description: the field path this tween writes, `component.field[.lane]` (`transform.pos.y`)

from.description: start value; NaN captures the field's current value on the first frame (the `.to` convenience)

elapsed.description: current clock position, seconds; seekable — set it to scrub

composite.description: how the sampled value applies to the field: `replace` overwrites it, `add` layers a transient delta

fill.description: whether the tween holds its value outside the active interval — `none`, `forwards`, `backwards`, `both`

sequence.description: the timeline this tween plays on, or 0 for standalone; resolves via `@name` in a scene

at.description: start offset on the sequence's playhead, seconds

target.description: the entity whose field is animated; resolves via `@name` in a scene

volumetric.summary: opt a light — {@link PointLight}, {@link Spot}, or the {@link DirectionalLight} sun — into volumetric
